name: Claire McDonough
background: Ms. McDonough has served as our Chief Financial Officer since January 2021. Prior to joining Rivian, Ms. McDonough was a Managing Director at J.P. Morgan, where she held various leadership roles in the Investment Bank from 2014 to 2021. She holds a B.A. in Public Policy and Economics from Duke University and an M.B.A. from the University of Chicago Booth School of Business.

company_affiliations.name: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Managing Director, Co-Head of Disruptive Commerce
